films.title: The Cincinnati Kid
films.overview: An up-and-coming poker player tries to prove himself in a high-stakes match against a long-time master of the game.

films.title: Birdman of Alcatraz
films.overview: After killing a prison guard, convict Robert Stroud faces life imprisonment in solitary confinement. Driven nearly mad by loneliness and despair, Stroud's life gains new meaning when he happens upon a helpless baby sparrow in the exercise yard and nurses it back to health. Despite having only a third grade education, Stroud goes on to become a renowned ornithologist and achieves a greater sense of freedom and purpose behind bars than most people find in the outside world.

films.title: On the Waterfront
films.overview: A prizefighter-turned-longshoreman with a conscience goes up against labor leaders to expose corruption, extortion, and murder among the union ranks.

films.title: A Streetcar Named Desire
films.overview: A disturbed, aging Southern belle moves in with her sister for solace — but being face-to-face with her brutish brother-in-law accelerates her downward spiral.

films.title: I Confess
films.overview: When a priest hears a murderer’s confession, he becomes bound by his vow of silence—even as circumstantial evidence turns suspicion toward him. Torn between faith and self-preservation, he faces public scandal and trial for a crime he cannot reveal the truth about.

films.title: Patton
films.overview: "Patton" tells the tale of General George S. Patton, famous tank commander of World War II. The film begins with Patton's career in North Africa and progresses through the invasion of Germany and the fall of the Third Reich. Side plots also speak of Patton's numerous faults such his temper and habit towards insubordination.

films.title: Pollyanna
films.overview: A young girl comes to an embittered town and confronts its attitude with her determination to see the best in life.

films.title: How the West Was Won
films.overview: The epic tale of the development of the American West from the 1830s through the Civil War to the end of the century, as seen through the eyes of one pioneer family.

films.title: The Gunfighter
films.overview: The fastest gun in the West tries to escape his reputation.

films.title: Where the Sidewalk Ends
films.overview: A police detective's violent nature keeps him from being a good cop.

films.title: One-Eyed Jacks
films.overview: Running from the law after a bank robbery in Mexico, Dad Longworth finds an opportunity to take the stolen gold and leave his partner Rio to be captured. Years later, Rio escapes from the prison where he has been since, and hunts down Dad for revenge. Dad is now a respectable sheriff in California, and has been living in fear of Rio's return.

films.title: The Cat o' Nine Tails
films.overview: A newsman works with a blind puzzle-solver to uncover a deadly conspiracy linked to a genetic research facility.
